description: Render a power-vs-sample-size curve (PNG) for a grant / protocol figure and emit the underlying (n, power) arrays as JSON.
rules: read-only: writes only into RECORD_STORE (a PNG figure + a JSON sidecar)
matplotlib runs headless (Agg backend) - no display required
TEST + EFFECT_SIZE drive the curve; n sweeps N_START..N_STOP step N_STEP (defaults 5..205 step 5)
a power curve / sensitivity range is the intended deliverable, not a single n
usage: Set TEST and EFFECT_SIZE (plus the test's extra params). Optional ALPHA, POWER (target line), ALTERNATIVE, N_START/N_STOP/N_STEP. Outputs: power_curve.png (figure) and power_curve.json (n + power arrays).
limitation: Closed-form tests only. The PNG is a planning figure, not a publication-final asset; restyle as needed.
